Uber is not paying fairly to drivers. The fares for rides keep increasing for customers, but drivers are still receiving very low payments. After fuel, vehicle maintenance, insurance, and Uber’s commission, the remaining amount is very small. Drivers are doing most of the work but are not being compensated fairly. Uber should review its payment structure and ensure drivers receive a fair share of the fare.

I suggest adding a feature to save an address with details along with the map pin. Currently we can only set a location point, but it would help if users could also add the exact house number, lane, and instructions like which road to enter from. For example, in my lane one gate is usually closed and another is open, but drivers often come from the closed side. Adding such instructions would reduce confusion and help drivers reach the correct entrance more easily.

Feature Suggestion: Student Status Verification Uber needs a formal student verification panel (like SheerID) in the profile section. Currently, there is a procedural gap where I have to manually prove my status to riders/drivers. Adding an official verification badge would prevent potential disputes and stop any exploitation of the lack of formal documentation. Please bridge this gap to improve the user experience for students!
